---
title: &TITLE "Peiyao Wang"
last: Wang
first: Peiyao
people_group: "postdoc"
email: "peiyao.w@outlook.com"
education:
  - "Ph.D. Mechanical Engineering | University of Melbourne | 2021 <br> B.Eng. Materials Engineering | Wuhan University of Technology | 2015"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher"
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:peiyao.w@outlook.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: ../../CVs/Resume_Peiyao_Wang_-1.pdf
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

Peiyao is a postdoctoral researcher in the STREAM Group. Her PhD at the University of Melbourne focused on nanoscience-based continuum models for ion distribution in water-filled nanoslits. She subsequently worked as a Research Fellow in Chemical Engineering at Melbourne, where she studied ion transport in nanoporous electrodes and electrolyte behaviour at interfaces.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

:::
